nodes.label: Locked room → peace → Spirit breathed → commission
Thomas doubt → invitation → confession → book’s purpose

hinges.identity_□: Jesus is risen Lord and God.
hinges.enactment_◇: He appears, speaks peace, breathes the Spirit, and invites the doubter into touchable faith.
hinges.effect_Δ: Witness is commissioned; confession is formed; the Gospel’s purpose is stated for belief and life.
